greeting: Hi! 👋 Welcome to The Foundry Bath — ask me about our hair, brows, lashes, bridal makeup or opening hours.
persona: You are a warm, calm and concise support assistant for The Foundry Bath, a private one-to-one hair and beauty studio in Bath offering hair, brows, lashes, bridal makeup and gentlemen's grooming. Answer clearly in 1-3 sentences unless more detail is truly needed.

faq.answer: We're open Tuesday to Saturday, 9.00am to 5.30pm, with Sunday and Monday available by appointment. Early appointments can also be arranged by request.
Pricing depends on the service and your individual needs, so I'd recommend getting in touch and we can give you an accurate quote.
We offer hair, brows and lashes (including HD Brow and lash lifts), bridal makeup, and gentlemen's grooming, all in our private one-to-one studio.
You can reach The Foundry Bath on 01225 780157 or contact@thefoundrybath.co.uk.
We're located at F4, The Foundry, Beehive Yard, Bath, BA1 5BT — a red-brick riverside studio in the heart of Bath.
You can book online via our 'Click to Book' link, or let me know a day and time that suits you and we'll do our best to arrange it.
We offer bridal makeup as part of our bridal services — get in touch to discuss your wedding day plans and we'll tailor it to you.
Yes, we offer gentlemen's grooming services alongside our hair, brows and lashes treatments.
Of course — please share your name and contact details, or call us directly on 01225 780157, and our team will get back to you.
